description: Alonso solo defender, S1-only isolation at level 3 (Onslaught active, S2/S3 zeroed). Anchor for WOS-136 level-driven benefit_vs hypothesis. Attacker WIP no heroes; defender Piddlyminx Alonso S1=3 S2=0 S3=0. Troop comp mirrors alonso_solo for direct comparison. RNG: S1 is chance-based (40%), needs N=10 game replicates.
